text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The morning of the NHK Mile Cup, Fuji Kiseki
asks the younger racer she hopes to inspire to
watch her race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki tells her about the hopes she's placed
on the mile tour and how she wants to deliver the
best races possible. No matter the stage, it's the
actors that make the show.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands are filled with mixed feelings. There
are people disappointed that Fuji Kiseki changed
courses and fans who are wholeheartedly rooting
for her. Her younger schoolmate is there too.
